message:
fix: remove invalid const fn qualifiers from phase gate builder methods

Mutex::new() and PhaseGate::new() are not const-evaluable, so
with_phase_gate() and with_phase_gate_config() cannot be const fn.
The compiler would reject these on newer toolchains; removing the
qualifier now prevents future breakage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
